Task.Name: Overall Project Duration Public Storage - Aventura
Storefront & Window Submittal (Rev 1) per revised detail Rev 4&5 - Cost Rejected by Owner
Storefront & Window Submittal - Per Latest Veneer Window Attachement Detail
Released for Fabrication & Deliver Elevator Equipment
Locate existing utilities for new tie-in
Delay - Conflict with Existing Drainage Structures - RFI#064 (On Going) - ESTIMATED
Cost for additional work per RFI#064 response - Submitted to PS
Cost Approval Additional Drainage work per RFI #064 - ESTIMATED
Fabrication of New Structrures EX-20 & Ex-70
Remove Old Structures & Install new ones
Potential Delay - Temp Access Permit to be Re-Issued
Notify Active Building of upcoming work
WASD Invoice for Additional Services - Waiting to be posted in Portal
WASD Inspector on Site for Installation - PER WASD Availability
Fire Line Underground w/ DDCV& FDC
Tie into Existing Stub as required
Site Lighting conduit, brooks boxes,& Fixture Installation
Fill Balance of Site & excavate Retention Areas
Prep and Pour Building Slab With Private Party Inspector
Steel Core Erection (Roof, 5th, 4th floor, 3rd floor, 2nd Floor)
Pour 4th, 5th floor slab and roof deck
Final Electrical - (Fire Life Safety Approval Requiered)
